title: Lakeflow Pipelines Editor is now generally available
body: The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor is now generally available. The editor offers an agent-first experience with Genie Code for creating, updating, and debugging production pipelines, with your code and Genie Code chat side by side with the pipeline graph and metrics. See [Develop and debug ETL pipelines with the Lakeflow Pipelines Editor](/aws/en/ldp/multi-file-editor).

ref_links.text: Develop and debug ETL pipelines with the Lakeflow Pipelines Editor
